TextENGNew: "...Is that so? A sudden business trip must be tough...@k@vS20/00/yukie44002.Please take care of yourself.@k@vS20/00/yukie44003.Where are you headed?@k@vS20/00/yukie44004.You're already there?"
If I was going on a business trip, she would naturally ask where.
...Anyone would ask that question, not just Yukie.
If it was somewhere cold, she'd remind me to pack a heavier coat.
If it was far away, she'd tell me to be careful on the road.
...The most ordinary of questions, leading to the most ordinary of concerns.
It made me a little sad that I couldn't answer such a simple question.
``...Sorry. It's something that you can't talk about, isn't it...@k@vS20/00/yukie44006. Please be careful.``
``...Sorry, Yukie.``
"...At some point, you started apologizing right away. Even though you were so spirited and fulfilled when you first started this job.@k@vS20/00/yukie44008....Hee hee."
Yukie laughed as though she could see right through me.
changeReason: The old translation says Yukie 'realized something,' but the Japanese (見透かしたように) means she could 'see through' him, conveying perceptiveness rather than mere realization.

TextENGNew: At times like these, Yukie possessed an almost magical power to read my innermost thoughts.
``...It's already been quite a while since I was admitted to the hospital. Are you finally getting lonely?``
``D-Don't tease me. I'm too old to get lonely...``
"...Hee hee. Oh, really? You're actually quite the needy one, aren't you...?@k@vS20/00/yukie44011.When I'm not around, you gradually lose your nerve, don't you...?@k@vS20/00/yukie44012.Hee hee hee."
``...Aww, geez... I can see the little devil horns sprouting from your head right now...@k@vS20/13/441300005. You've always been like this.``
``...You can't hide it, you can't hide it. If I don't play with you, you get aaaallll lonely.@k@vS20/00/yukie44014. I can hear your tail wagging over the phone.@k@vS20/00/yukie44015. Hee hee hee...``
This side of Yukie was impossible to guess from her usual modest demeanor, and she never showed it to anyone but me.
Normally I'd give her a playful poke to hide my embarrassment and force the conversation to an end, but I couldn't do that over the phone.
...Yukie was clever, of course.@kShe was teasing me precisely because she knew that.
``...Hee hee hee. I wonder when I figured out that giving you grief was this much fun...``
``Give me a break... ...In any case, it's good to hear you so lively.``
``...I know, right? ...Did I cheer you up?``
I had called so Yukie wouldn't feel lonely, left all by herself in the hospital.
...But of course, that was nothing more than a pretense born of my own shyness.@kYukie had seen through it long ago.

"Please call again sometime... When I'm not up to talking, Father can keep you company.@k@vS20/00/yukie44019....Though knowing you, you'd probably stand at attention on the other end of the line if you were speaking with him.@k@vS20/00/yukie44020.Hee hee hee..."
For a while longer, Yukie went on teasing me without giving me a chance to hang up...
